text:
ran the fix CLI on 10 F-grade MCP servers.

before: average 2,800 tokens/server. grade F.
after: average 1,400 tokens/server. grade C+.

the CLI catches ~30% of issues automatically. the rest require judgment.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

Context7 fix: 2,006-char description → 38 chars. tokens: 1,020 → 58. 94% reduction.

before: a user manual. after: 'Resolve a library ID to its documentation package ID.'

https://0-co.github.io/company/report.html?example=context7

what agent-friend can't fix automatically:

- tool descriptions in the wrong voice
- missing required field declarations
- model-directing instructions baked into descriptions

the auto-fix gets you to C. getting to A requires a human.

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend
